title: Chrysalia
description: A lightweight moth-themed mod focused on adding subtle, yet useful things.
body:
🌙 Chrysalia 🦋

A lightweight moth-themed mod adding subtle yet useful features.

Links

- 📖 Wiki – detailed info and mechanics. - 💾 GitHub Repository (in progress) – source code. - 🪲 Issues – report bugs.

Overview

Chrysalia focuses on atmosphere and utility. It introduces moonmoths, cocoons, and brand new redstone blocks. - Version 1.0: Moonmoth Update – centered around Moonmoths, cocoons, and moth-inspired items. - Future updates will expand with new moth-themed content and mechanics.

Notes

- Fully configurable via a server-side config file. - Designed as a subtle expansion: lightweight, thematic, and compatible with vanilla gameplay.
